top_signals.title: U.S. and Iran still without deal to end war after Trump says he's not in a 'hurry'
top_signals.summary: Trump threatened further military action if negotiations break down and the U.S. does not receive the concessions from Iran it desires.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Knicks Tickets Reach Record Prices Ahead of Finals
top_signals.summary: For the first time in 27 years, the New York Knicks are back in the NBC finals where they will face the San Antonio Spurs. Bloomberg Business of Sports Podcast Host Vanessa Perdomo joined Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss how Knicks fans have been waiting a long time for New York to bring home an NBA championship and ho much they're willing to pay a lot for a shot at witnessing history. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
